Cummins · Engine

Cummins KTA50-M2

Spare parts for the Cummins KTA50-M2 marine diesel – liner kits, piston kits, bearings, gasket kits, valve gear, and turbochargers.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
3007525Liner KIT, Cylinder
3803530Piston Kit
2881745Set Piston Ring
3018210Main bearing set/ STANDARD
3650900CR Bearing
3175805Cam Bush
205230Cam Bush
3043909Connecting Rod Bush
5492347Upper Gasket Kit
5492348Lower Gasket kit
2881836Intake Valve
3803528Exhaust Valve
3086192Valve Insert
205091Valve Collet
3640315Valve Rotator
3202210Valve Stem Guide
2881956Turbocharger Assembly
3545647Turbocharger
3634648LUBE OIL PUMP - KTA50
4372338Fresh Water Pump

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
